title: Goal Contracts and Observable Completion · State Clinic: Success Measures
summary: Turn a vague long-running objective into an executable goal contract. Planned artifact: Add and verify the loops success measures increment in a measurable goal and done-condition specification. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Attach observable success measures, boundaries, and evidence requirements.
Write a goal as an outcome rather than an unbounded activity.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Build Success Measures evidence
steps.instruction: Append a contract headed "Evidence: loops-success-measures-up376b" with concrete Goal, Context, Constraints, Output, and Done when sections tailored to this case.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Success Measures into observable performance evidence.

content.code:
Evidence: loops-success-measures-up376b
Goal: [replace with one observable outcome]
Context: [replace with decision-relevant facts]
Constraints: [replace with authority and safety boundaries]
Output: [replace with the artifact and evidence shape]
Done when: [replace with changed-case acceptance criteria]
content.caption: Shape of the required increment; replace generic language with the current stakeholder case.
